title: It's as Shrimple as That
description: A shrimple mod about everyone's favorite crustaceans.
body:
# It's as Shrimple as That
A Shrimple mod about everybody's favorite crustaceans.

The life of every shrimp begins at the bottom of the ocean, where they can be found abundantly.

![A group of shrimp on the sea floor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GW9EtJVI/images/af33dc9016bf3543fb078d779bd5d54931d90c0e.png)

Did you know that every shrimp dreams of becoming a world-famous chef? Well, thanks to the latest and greated Minecraft update, these dreams can finally come true!

![A pair of shrimp, eager to cook some food](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GW9EtJVI/images/86e0df811f6da13888990c686bea97da20e24244.png)

When given access to a Frying Table*, these shrimp will put their skills to work to cook you the greatest meal you've ever had!

*on inferior versions without this incredible block, a campfire works as a substitute.

![An offer from the shrimp: two gems for one bowl of rice](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GW9EtJVI/images/37148806a3e5bf545a5cc506f4fb39d96380af15.png)

What else can these fantastic little fellas do? That's for you to find! I hear they know a thing or two about crossbows...
